OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Millie S Lum, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, William Hefferon, is present.
Attorney, James Hurley , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Benjamin Holl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of Mar-01-2010 is vacated.
